title: SimpleRats
description:
This mod Adds vanilla plus rats and a new farming system!
the rats come in diffrent colors and styles
body:
This is simple Rats A mod ive been working on adding rats of diffrent colors styles and intrests such as the skeleton rat![Skeleton Rat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b60e98c43eb41e43355dc5acc42043dc0a270010.png)
The Simple Rat![Normal Rat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1710adc0e0de7fcd1bdaf6bf726cf2f4e4a0e45a.png)
and Many Many more! to come
This mod also includes some blocks and items such as the mouse trap a block used to stop pesky rats from eating your hay and cheese!. You can also tame the rats color them and go to war with them fighting your friends with rats will surly be an expirance! If You would like to support this mod Downloading and following is A Large help!
Models Textures and Code: Noxturnal
Warning This mod is not at all realated to any other rat mods the model of rats may be Somewhat simular to another one but its not!.
